title: Fulminic acid
body:
Fulminic acid is an acid with the formula HCNO, more specifically H‚àíC‚â°N+‚àíO‚àí. It is an isomer of isocyanic acid (H‚àíN=C=O) and of its elusive tautomer, cyanic acid (H‚àíO‚àíC‚â°N), and also of isofulminic acid (H‚àíO‚àíN+‚â°C‚àí). 
Fulminate is the anion [C‚àí‚â°N+‚àíO‚àí] of any of its salts. For historical reasons, the fulminate functional group is understood to be ‚àíO‚àíN+‚â°C‚àí as in isofulminic acid; whereas the group ‚àíC‚â°N+O‚àí is called nitrile oxide.
